_doc: Routes are matched top-to-bottom; specific patterns MUST come before
the catch-all '/*' or SWA refuses to deploy with a 'covered by wildcard'
Next.js hashed bundle URLs (/_next/static/...) are safe to cache
forever — the URL itself changes when the content does.
HTML pages must NOT be cached aggressively. Without this Azure SWA's
CDN edge honored Next.js's default `s-maxage=31536000` and served
literally year-old HTML to iPhone PWAs even after a fresh install.
/version.json is the PWA's update-detection beacon — it MUST skip
every cache (browser + CDN) to be useful.
